backend/src/main/java/volunteer/plus/bac.general_idea: Enable Spring's asynchronous method execution support.

backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 3.3.4 to 3.4.3 to align with JDK 21 support and latest features.
Update the project's target Java version property from 17 to 21.
Introduce Spring AI BOM to manage versions for AI-related dependencies.
Add AWS Java SDK for S3 to support file storage operations.
Add Spring Boot WebSocket starter to enable real-time communication features.
Add Thymeleaf starter to support server-side HTML templating.
Add Spring Boot Mail starter to enable email sending capabilities.
Add Spring Boot Cache starter to support caching mechanisms.
Add Spring AI OpenAI starter to integrate with OpenAI models.
Add Spring AI Ollama starter to integrate with local Ollama models.
Add Spring AI PDF document reader to process PDF files for AI ingestion.
Add Spring AI Tika document reader to process various document formats for AI ingestion.
Add Spring AI Redis store starter to use Redis as a vector store for embeddings.
Include the AWS S3 SDK dependency in the project dependencies.
Add JJWT API dependency for JWT token handling.
Add JJWT implementation dependency for JWT token handling.
Add JJWT Jackson dependency for JSON serialization in JWT handling.
Add Spring Boot Actuator starter for production-ready monitoring and management.
Add Spring Boot Security starter to enable authentication and authorization.
Add Spring Milestones repository to resolve pre-release Spring AI dependencies.
Explicitly set Maven compiler source and target to Java 8, likely overriding the parent or property settings.

backend/Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the Maven builder stage to use OpenJDK 21 to compile the application with the new JDK version.
Update the runtime stage to use OpenJDK 21 to ensure the application runs on the target JDK version.

backend/src/main/resources/application.p.general_idea: Enable Java 21 virtual threads support for improved concurrency performance.

compose.yml.general_idea: Mount the frontend index.html file into the container to ensure static assets are available.
Pass the API base URL environment variable to the frontend container for runtime configuration.
Add a Redis service with modules to support caching and session management.
Add Redis Insight UI service for monitoring and debugging Redis data.
Add an Ollama service to run local AI models.
Update backend service to depend on Redis, Redis Insight, and Ollama services.
Explicitly pass database connection details to the backend service.
Pass AWS credentials and bucket configuration to the backend service.
Pass email server configuration to the backend service.
Pass Liqpay payment gateway keys to the backend service.
Pass OpenAI API key to the backend service for AI integration.
Configure backend to connect to the Redis service.
Configure backend to connect to the Ollama service.
Define named volumes for Ollama data and Redis Insight persistence.

frontend/index.html.general_idea: Standardize the HTML doctype declaration to uppercase for better compliance with HTML5 specifications.
Integrate external Google Fonts (Montserrat and Roboto Slab) to support the application's visual design system.

frontend/package.json.general_idea: Added @react-spring/web to enable physics-based animations in the UI.
Added @reduxjs/toolkit and react-redux to manage global application state.
Added classnames utility to conditionally join CSS class names.
Added formik to handle form state and validation logic.
Added react-loader-spinner to display loading indicators during async operations.
Added react-router-dom to enable client-side navigation and routing.
Added yup to define validation schemas for form data.
Added sass-embedded to compile SCSS stylesheets.
Added vite-plugin-svgr to allow importing SVG files as React components.

frontend/src/main.tsx.general_idea: Wrap the application root with Redux Provider to enable state management across components.
Update import statements to use absolute path aliases and named exports for better module resolution.
frontend/src/main.tsx.human_impl: import { App } from '@/app'; import { store } from '@/store';

frontend/src/main.tsx.general_idea: Add semicolons to import statements to comply with stricter linting rules.

frontend/src/vite-env.d.ts.general_idea: Add type definitions for vite-plugin-svgr to enable TypeScript support for importing SVGs as React components.
Define TypeScript interfaces for Vite environment variables to provide type safety for configuration values.

frontend/tsconfig.app.json.general_idea: Configure TypeScript path aliases to allow importing modules using the '@/' shorthand relative to the src directory.
